AV1 video encoding and transcoding via s: AV1 video encoding and transcoding via slashed.cloud.
Your Bearer Token from the slashed.cloud: Your Bearer Token from the slashed.cloud dashboard. Go to your service settings to find or generate it.
Requests a video encoding job on slashed: Requests a video encoding job on slashed.cloud.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Hacer una llamada API personalizada a un extremo específico
No Error on Failure: No hay ningún error en fallo
Your service ID from the slashed.cloud d: Your service ID from the slashed.cloud dashboard. Found under your service settings.
Path or URL of the source video file in: Path or URL of the source video file in the storage you have configured for your service.
Array of encoding job objects to apply t: Array of encoding job objects to apply to the source file. Each object must include a `type` field specifying the job type (e.g. `{ "type": "encode", "output": "output.mp4" }`).
Processing priority for this encoding re: Processing priority for this encoding request.
Optional URL to receive a POST request w: Optional URL to receive a POST request when encoding completes. Slashed will send the result to this endpoint.
Authorization headers are injected autom: Las cabeceras de autorización se inyectan automáticamente desde tu conexión.
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
HEAD: LIMPIO
